headline: Is IAMGOLD (IAG) One of the Best TSX Stocks to Buy After Its Moody’s Upgrade?
summary: IAMGOLD Corporation (NYSE:IAG) is one of the best TSX stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On April 9, Moody’s Ratings upgraded IAMGOLD Corporation’s (NYSE:IAG) corporate family rating to B1 from B2. This call was supported by IAMGOLD’s reduction of its debt load and its successful ramp-up of the Côté Gold mine in Ontario, Canada. […]

headline: Moody's Revises China Outlook To Stable, Affirms A1 Rating
summary: Agency cites resilient growth, export strength, and controlled debt risks despite domestic and geopolitical challenges.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Moodys, Lowers Price Target to $521
summary: Mizuho  analyst Sean Kennedy   maintains Moodys (NYSE:MCO) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $524 to $521.
